strategy: Diff-driven surgical refresh: git diff 134a1ef..e34bbf3 (32 commits, 253 files) was the staleness map. Three arcs of drift: (1) TanStack migration COMPLETED + data-layer hardening (PRs #111-#120: useSeatingChart Phase 5, useLayoutPresets #11 + legacy realtime sub deleted, realtime callback collapse #13, atomic seating RPCs #27, Zod #15, unwrap #14, batched totals RPC #8, event-driven undo #6/#22, batch_kind #7, dnd-kit click fix); (2) mobile + native (PRs #132-#137: responsive phone shell, Capacitor iOS+Android, auth resilience, seating touch, Preferences auth storage, account deletion + privacy policy + SECURITY DEFINER totals-trigger migration); (3) housekeeping (README/license, Dependabot overrides, CI unit+integration jobs, dep bumps). Five parallel read-only Explore agents produced file:line-cited maps (native shell, auth/account-deletion, mobile shell, seating, data-layer/CI); every count was re-derived by shell and the unit suite was run (44 files / 376 tests green). Accurate doc content was preserved; stale claims (two-legacy-hooks narrative, layout_presets realtime drift, 17 new Error sites, localStorage-only auth, 22/5/3 test counts, 13 migrations) were replaced.

completed_steps.summary: Archived the completed 2026-06-02 exhaustive full_rescan state (>24h old, documented HEAD 134a1ef). User confirmed: full rescan, exhaustive.

Classification user-confirmed: monolith, single part, project_type_id=web (React 19 SPA + Supabase BaaS, TypeScript strict). NEW: Capacitor native packaging target (ios/ 23 + android/ 77 tracked files + capacitor.config.ts + resources/), documented within the same part with mobile-row requirements applied supplementally.

Existing docs inventoried: README.md + LICENSE.md (NEW, 01c5ee3), AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, ADR-005 (modified in range), docs/legacy/* (8), modernization-plan.md, point-counter-inventory.md, rules-review-category-3.md, _bmad-output artifacts. User guidance: no extra focus areas, diff-driven. Generated docs had received partial in-range updates (PRs #113/#117/#118/#119) but anchors were stale at 134a1ef and nothing from #132-#137 was reflected.

Resolved stack re-derived from package-lock.json (lockfileVersion 3): React 19.2.7, TypeScript 6.0.3, Vite 8.1.5 (was 8.0.16), Tailwind 4.3.3 (was 4.3.0), supabase-js 2.110.7 (was 2.106.2), TanStack Query 5.101.2 (was 5.100.14), Zod 4.4.3, Vitest 4.1.10, Playwright 1.61.1 (was 1.60.0), ESLint 10.7.0 (was 10.4.1), Prettier 3.9.5, lint-staged 17.0.8, lucide-react 1.24.0 (was 1.17.0). NEW: Capacitor 8.4.2 family (core/cli/ios/android + preferences 8.0.1, status-bar 8.0.3, splash-screen 8.0.2, haptics 8.0.2, app 8.1.1, assets 3.0.5) and @fontsource self-hosted fonts. Overrides grew: uuid ^14, tar ^7.5.20, replace.minimatch ^3.1.3 (4f1ea1f). New scripts: cap:build/cap:sync/cap:open:ios/cap:run:ios/cap:assets; typecheck now also checks tests/tsconfig.json.

Exhaustive diff-driven analysis. Counts (my shell commands): 164 src ts/tsx/css; 120 non-test; 51 component tsx; 18 src/hooks .ts (17 impl + barrel; useDeleteAccount NEW); 44 unit test files / 376 tests green (vitest run); 8 integration; 6 e2e; 17 migrations; exactly 2 realtime sites (useTransactions.ts:83, useStudents.ts:46); 55 non-test from(' literals; 13 set-state-in-effect disables in 11 files; AppContext 33 LOC; 1 edge function. Playwright: 4 projects (setup/chromium/mobile 390x844/ipad 834x1194). Five Explore agents returned file:line-cited reports: native-surface (capacitor.config appId com.frankcottone.classpoints, native.ts 47 / haptics.ts 22 / authStorage.ts 104 / appUrl.ts 65 LOC, viewport-lock vite plugin + relative base, resources/ 3 assets, privacy.html 181, AndroidManifest allowBackup=false), auth-surface (AuthContext 497 LOC two-stage bounded boot 8s+5s, isNetworkClassAuthError whitelist supabase.ts:157, authSuspended+OfflineGate, AuthGuard-level ResetPasswordForm, updateEmail request-not-change, delete-account edge fn 67 LOC JWT-only + cascade + verify_jwt=true), mobile-shell (Layout h-dvh flex-col md:flex-row, BottomNav 69 LOC, Sidebar hidden md:flex, activity overlay, --app-bottom-nav-h, Modal/Dialog 100dvh clamps, iOS 16px input guard, @fontsource in main.tsx), seating-surface (useSeatingChart TanStack 1340 LOC / 3 caches / 17 optimistic mutations / 4 RPCs via unwrap / 25-value return / no realtime, useLayoutPresets 196 LOC Zod both directions, SeatingChartEditor 1630 LOC touch sensors + 0.44 touch-scale floor, seating-atomic-writes.sql 4 RPCs SECURITY INVOKER), data-layer (supabase.ts 171 LOC unwrap/isPostgrestError + native storage adapter, useTransactions 538 LOC exports re-anchored, database.ts +batch_kind/BatchKind/TimeTotalsRow + RPC swap, migrations 20260611145458/20260611173650/20260717033000 SECURITY DEFINER cascade fix, CI test.yml NEW unit+integration jobs, test-summary needs 6).

Refreshed all 8 generated docs to HEAD e34bbf3. data-models: 17 migrations, batch_kind column + named CHECK, SECURITY DEFINER totals trigger + rationale, atomic seating RPC table, NEW Edge Functions section, realtime subs corrected to exactly 2, database.ts type additions. state-management: migration-COMPLETE summary, AuthGuard branch precedence + App.tsx native glue, useTransactions line cites re-anchored (:120/:272/:294 etc.), useStudents re-anchored, Legacy section replaced with TanStack useLayoutPresets/useSeatingChart sections, AuthContext section fully rewritten (497 LOC resilience flow), ThemeContext syncStatusBar, Adapter contracts rewritten to unwrap() era, DashboardView undo cites re-derived (:100/:102-111/:124-150). architecture: exec summary (migration complete + Capacitor), pattern table rows (topology/state/auth/realtime/routing/styling/build/bundle/testing/deployment), provider stack, RPC+Edge Function section, invalidate-not-merge corrected, NEW Native shell section, responsive phone shell subsection, testing strategy 44/376+8+6 with CI jobs. component-inventory: 51 files, +OfflineGate/ResetPasswordForm/BottomNav/DeleteAccountModal rows, responsive updates across Layout/Sidebar/DashboardView/BottomToolbar/SyncStatus/Modal/Dialog/ErrorToast/UndoToast/seating, haptics note, categorization + phone-shell design tokens. source-tree: top-level tree (+ios/android/capacitor.config/resources/README/LICENSE), src tree (components 51, hooks all-TanStack annotations, lib additions), supabase tree (17 migrations + functions/), tests tree (6 e2e + 8 integration + full 44-file unit listing), CI annotation, entry-points table. development-guide: cap:* scripts + typecheck update, Xcode/Android Studio prereq, unit 44/376 + integration 8 + E2E 4-project sections, CI jobs rewritten (7 jobs), capacitor + native-storage gotchas, set-state-in-effect 13/11. project-overview: full rewrite (snapshot table with resolved versions + native/validation/fonts/license rows, 3-arc HEAD narrative, migration-COMPLETE status, cap quick-reference). index: anchor + table + quick reference + entry points + getting-started refreshed.
Master index re-anchored to HEAD e34bbf3 with Capacitor/license rows and native entry points. All 8 generated docs present; zero '(To be generated)' markers needed.

Validated: residual-staleness grep sweep clean across the 8 docs (no 134a1ef-as-HEAD anchors, stale versions 2.106.2/5.100.14/8.0.16/1.17.0/4.1.8/1.60.0/10.4.1/3.8.3, 'two legacy', '13 migrations', '22 unit'/'26 active'/'3 active' counts, '1122 LOC'/'155 LOC'/'23-value', or legacy-subscription-as-current claims remain; surviving 'hand-rolled' matches are deliberate negations or the legacy-inventory link). Incomplete-marker scan (strict + fuzzy) → 0. python3 -m json.tool → valid. prettier --write then --check → all 9 files pass. Relative-link resolution: 48/48 resolve. Two stale source-tree annotations (App.tsx/AuthContext) caught and fixed during validation. Unit suite previously verified green (44 files / 376 tests).
Workflow complete; exhaustive diff-driven full_rescan finalized at HEAD e34bbf3.

project_classification.architecture_type: React SPA plus Supabase BaaS, Capacitor-wrapped for iOS/Android

findings.head_snapshot: e34bbf3 on main (prior scan documented 134a1ef; diff range = 32 commits, 253 files)

technology_stack.tech_summary: React 19.2.7, TypeScript 6.0.3 strict, Node >=25, Vite 8.1.5, Tailwind CSS 4.3.3, Supabase JS 2.110.7, TanStack Query 5.101.2, Zod 4.4.3, Capacitor 8.4.2 (ios+android; preferences/status-bar/splash-screen/haptics/app plugins), @fontsource self-hosted fonts, Vitest 4.1.10, Playwright 1.61.1, ESLint 10.7.0 (react-hooks 7.1.1), Prettier 3.9.5, lint-staged 17.0.8, lucide-react 1.24.0, uuid 14 via override.

key_drift_since_prior_scan: TanStack migration COMPLETE: useSeatingChart migrated (Phase 5, PR #111 — 1340 LOC, 3 per-table caches, 17 optimistic mutations, atomic RPCs, no realtime) and useLayoutPresets migrated (#11, PR #112 — 196 LOC, Zod both directions, legacy layout_presets realtime subscription DELETED). Production realtime = exactly 2 sites = ADR-005 §6 target met.
Error handling normalized behind unwrap()/isPostgrestError (#14, PR #116) in src/lib/supabase.ts (171 LOC); 0 hand-rolled throw sites in src/hooks; 3 curated-copy exceptions in useTransactions.ts.

Batched get_student_time_totals_all_for_user RPC (#8, PR #117, migration 20260611145458 — SECURITY INVOKER, drops legacy per-classroom RPC); point_transactions.batch_kind column (#7, PR #119, named CHECK); event-driven undo expiry + single transactions mount (#6/#22, PR #118).

Capacitor 8 native shell (PRs #132/#136): ios/ + android/ platforms, capacitor.config.ts, resources/, cap:* scripts, vite --mode capacitor relative base + viewport lock, src/lib bridge modules (native/haptics/authStorage/appUrl), Preferences auth storage on native, AndroidManifest allowBackup=false.

Responsive phone shell (PR #132): Layout h-dvh flex-col md:flex-row, BottomNav (md:hidden 3-tab), Sidebar hidden md:flex, DashboardView phone activity overlay, --app-bottom-nav-h toast offset token, safe-area insets, Modal/Dialog dvh clamps, iOS 16px input guard.

Auth resilience (PR #134): AuthContext 497 LOC — two-stage bounded boot (8s getSession + 5s getUser), isNetworkClassAuthError whitelist discrimination, authSuspended → OfflineGate, boot-hash password recovery → AuthGuard-level ResetPasswordForm, updateEmail request-not-change UX, self-hosted fonts.

In-app account deletion (PR #137): delete-account Edge Function (67 LOC, JWT-only identity, service-role deleteUser, FK cascade, verify_jwt=true), DeleteAccountModal type-to-confirm, privacy.html; surfaced the 20260717033000 SECURITY DEFINER totals-trigger fix (cascade ran as supabase_auth_admin → 42501).

Seating touch support (PR #135) + click-select fix (PR #120): PrimaryButtonMouseSensor distance:5 + TouchSensor delay:200/tolerance:8, scale-compensated drag/resize math, auto-fit with MIN_TOUCH_SCALE 0.44 floor, SeatingChartEditor 1630 LOC + 36-case test suite + iPad E2E project.

Testing doubled: unit 22→44 files (376 tests), integration 5→8, e2e 3→6 across 4 Playwright projects (setup/chromium/mobile/ipad). CI test.yml gained unit + integration jobs (test-summary now needs 6); integration realtime DELETE test CI-skipped.
Housekeeping: README + PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 license, 8 Dependabot alerts resolved via overrides (uuid/tar/minimatch), gitignore hardening, supabase/.temp untracked.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed at HEAD e34bbf3 (2026-07-17). Start a new full rescan when HEAD moves materially past e34bbf3.
out_of_scope_observations: _bmad-output/project-context.md (owned by bmad-generate-project-context, NOT this workflow) is anchored at HEAD 134a1ef and is now materially stale: it still describes useSeatingChart as a hand-rolled migration target, lists 3 realtime subscriptions, counts 26 test files / 14 migrations, and knows nothing of the Capacitor/auth-resilience/account-deletion work. Its own staleness check (the recent-commits list) correctly fires. Consider re-running bmad-generate-project-context.
docs/legacy/* inventories still describe the pre-TanStack world; index.md already frames them as historical.

The five Explore-agent reports were used as maps; every doc-written claim was either re-verified by my own Read/grep/wc or carries the agents' file:line citations, with load-bearing line refs (useTransactions internals, DashboardView undo machinery, queryKeys, vite.config, newest migration, playwright.config) independently re-read in this session.

validation_commands: shell count derivations (find/grep/wc/ls) for every cited count
npx vitest run → 44 files / 376 tests passed
residual-staleness grep sweep (2 rounds, ~30 patterns) across the 8 generated docs
incomplete-documentation marker scan (strict '(To be generated)' + fuzzy TBD/TODO/Coming soon/Pending) → 0
npx prettier --write + --check on the 8 docs + state JSON → clean
relative-link resolution across the 8 generated docs → 48/48 resolve
